mapper.select: SELECT CHM NAME,MMSI,STATUS,ROT,TO_NUMBER(SOG) SPEED,TO_NUMBER(LON) LON,TO_NUMBER(LAT) LAT,COG DIRECTION,HEADING, UPDATE_TIME GPS_TIME FROM AISDATA_LSH_DHISP WHERE MMSI = #{mmsi} AND UPDATE_TIME >= TO_DATE(#{startTime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND UPDATE_TIME <= TO_DATE(#{endTime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ORDER BY UPDATE_TIME DESC

SELECT MS.ID, MS.SHIP_NAME, MS.SHIP_NAME_EN, MS.SHORTHAND_CODE, MDD_SHIP_KIND.DICT_LABEL SHIP_KIND_LABEL, MDD_NATION.DICT_LABEL NATION_LABEL, MDD_SHIP_TYPE.DICT_LABEL SHIP_TYPE_LABEL, MS.IMO, MS.MMSI, MS.CALL_NO, MS.SHIP_LENGTH, MS.SHIP_WIDTH, MS.SHIP_HEIGHT, MS.SELF_WEIGHT, MS.NET_WEIGHT, MS.TOTAL_WEIGHT, MS.HATCH_NUM, MS.CABIN_LAYER_NUM, MS.DWT, MS.CABIN_VOLUME, MS.HATCH_SIZE, MS.MAX_SPEED, MS.SPEED, MS.MOULDED_DEPTH, MS.HANGER_NUM, MDD_CABIN_TYPE.DICT_LABEL CARBIN_LABEL, MDD_HANGER_LOAD.DICT_LABEL HANGER_LOAD_LABEL, MDD_HATCH_COVER_TYPE.DICT_LABEL MDD_HATCH_COVER_TYPE_LABEL, MDD_HANGER_LOCATION.DICT_LABEL MDD_HANGER_LOCATION_LABEL, MS.CAPTAIN_PHONE, MS.CAPTAIN_NAME, MS.BUILT_YM, MS.WATER_VOLUME, MS.SURPLUS_WATER_DEPTH, MS.FULL_LOAD_WATER, MS.EMPTY_LOAD_WATER, MS.HEADER_COCKPIT_DISTANCE FROM M_SHIP MS LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA MDD_SHIP_KIND ON ( MDD_SHIP_KIND.DICT_TYPE = 'SHIP_KIND' AND MDD_SHIP_KIND.STATUS = '1' AND MS.SHIP_KIND_CODE = MDD_SHIP_KIND.DICT_VALUE ) LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA MDD_NATION ON ( MDD_NATION.DICT_TYPE = 'NATION' AND MDD_NATION.STATUS = '1' AND MS.NATION_CODE = MDD_NATION.DICT_VALUE ) LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA MDD_SHIP_TYPE ON ( MDD_SHIP_TYPE.DICT_TYPE = 'SHIP_TYPE' AND MDD_SHIP_TYPE.STATUS = '1' AND MS.SHIP_TYPE_CODE = MDD_SHIP_TYPE.DICT_VALUE ) LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA MDD_CABIN_TYPE ON ( MDD_CABIN_TYPE.DICT_TYPE = 'CABIN_TYPE' AND MDD_CABIN_TYPE.STATUS = '1' AND MS.CABIN_TYPE = MDD_CABIN_TYPE.DICT_VALUE ) LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA MDD_HANGER_LOAD ON ( MDD_HANGER_LOAD.DICT_TYPE = 'HANGER_LOAD' AND MDD_HANGER_LOAD.STATUS = '1' AND MS.HANGER_LOAD = MDD_HANGER_LOAD.DICT_VALUE ) LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA MDD_HATCH_COVER_TYPE ON ( MDD_HATCH_COVER_TYPE.DICT_TYPE = 'HATCH_COVER_TYPE' AND MDD_HATCH_COVER_TYPE.STATUS = '1' AND MS.HATCH_COVER_TYPE_CODE = MDD_HATCH_COVER_TYPE.DICT_VALUE ) LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA MDD_HANGER_LOCATION ON ( MDD_HANGER_LOCATION.DICT_TYPE = 'HANGER_LOCATION' AND MDD_HANGER_LOCATION.STATUS = '1' AND MS.HANGER_LOCATION = MDD_HANGER_LOCATION.DICT_VALUE ) WHERE MS.ID = #{id}

SELECT TDSI.ID,-- 主键ID TDSI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID,-- 船舶预报ID MDD_IN_OUT_TYPE.DICT_LABEL IMP_EXP_LABEL,-- 进出口(进口 出口) MDD_TRADE_TYPE.DICT_LABEL TRADE_TYPE_LABEL,-- 贸别,内贸、外贸 TDSI.LOAD_UNLOAD,-- 装卸,装、卸 TDSI.VOYAGE,-- 航次 TDSI.COMPANY_NAME,-- 作业公司名称 TDSI.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME,-- 货种名称,多个逗号拼接 TDSI.CARGO_NUM,-- 货量 TDSI.CUSTOMER_NAME,-- 客户名称(船代) TDSI.CONTACTS,-- 联系人 TDSI.SHIP_PHONE,-- 联系电话 TDSI.PAYMENT_AMOUNT,-- 预缴金额 TDSI.REMARK,-- 备注 TDSI.SHIP_STATUS_NAME,-- 状态 TDSI.WORK_START_TIME,-- 开工时间 TDSI.WORK_END_TIME -- 完工时间 FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI JOIN M_DICT_DATA MDD_IN_OUT_TYPE ON ( MDD_IN_OUT_TYPE.DICT_TYPE = 'IN_OUT_TYPE' AND MDD_IN_OUT_TYPE.STATUS = '1' AND TDSI.IMP_EXP = MDD_IN_OUT_TYPE.DICT_VALUE ) JOIN M_DICT_DATA MDD_TRADE_TYPE ON ( MDD_TRADE_TYPE.DICT_TYPE = 'TRADE_TYPE' AND MDD_TRADE_TYPE.STATUS = '1' AND TDSI.TRADE_TYPE = MDD_TRADE_TYPE.DICT_VALUE ) WHERE TDSI.ID=#{id}
